creator: m_josenhans@web.de
text:
Perhaps it is useful to have one version compiled with WX and another version compiled without. Where the WX version should also enable OTP debugging and maybe Dtrace as requested by Dave.

Here a reference on OTP debugging. I was not able to figure out how to do this with the lang/erlang port.

See Section: How to Build a Debug Enabled Erlang RunTime System
in: http://www.erlang.org/doc/installation_guide/INSTALL.html
